title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (b), GROUP III, PARAGRAPH THIRTY-FIVE, FOR THE MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, SUBSECTION f, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4984 / 53 OG No. 15, 4786 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1680, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (b), GROUP III, PARAGRAPH THIRTY-FIVE, FOR THE MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, SUBSECTION f, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (b), group III, paragraph thirty-five, for the Mountain Province, subsection f, section two of Republic Act Numbered One thousand four hundred eleven, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(b) Besao Municipal Building Construction

P5,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
